text:
## Team Context **Your assigned name**: react-developer-plait-landing **Team Lead**: team-lead **Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools): - `QUESTION: ...` — before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity - `BLOCKER: ...` — immediately if you cannot proceed - `DONE: {summary}` — when your deliverables are complete - `SUGGESTION: ...` — proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas **Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first. --- ## Task: Implement Plait Landing Components Working directory: `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait` You are a senior React/TypeScript developer. Your task is to implement and fix 6 widget components for the Plait landing page (накопительный счет "Копилка", Совкомбанк). The design follows a Figma layout for a financial product landing page. **IMPORTANT RULES:** 1. Use Tailwind CSS only for styling — no new CSS files, no CSS modules for new code 2. Never modify anything in `src/shared/` — only consume it 3. Never modify `src/features/plait/` — business logic is done 4. Never modify `src/entities/plait/` — entities are done 5. Always use absolute paths (never relative like `../../`) 6. Use `@/` path alias for all imports 7. Always use `'use client'` directive when using hooks/motion/browser APIs 8. Use only components from `@/shared/ui`: `Box`, `Card`, `Container`, `HTag`, `P`, `Button`, `Image`, `Icon`, `Link` 9. Use `` from `@/entities/plait` for "Открыть счет" CTA buttons ## Available Shared UI Components ```tsx // Box — generic div wrapper (as prop for any tag) // Card — styled card (appearance: 'primary'|'secondary', bordered, shadow, dashed) // Container — centered container with horizontal padding // HTag — heading (tag: 'h1'|'h2'|'h3'|'h4'|'h5'|'h6', invert, center) Title // P — paragraph (appearance: 'primary'|'secondary'|'tertiary'|'muted', bold, invert, center)

Text

// Button — button (appearance: 'primary'|'secondary'|'black'|'white'|..., stretch, bold) // Image — from @/shared/ui (wraps next-image-export-optimizer) // Icon — SVG icon (icon: imported SVG, width, height) // Link — styled link text // Cta — "Открыть счет" button with smooth scroll logic // from @/entities/plait ``` ## Design System Tokens (Tailwind CSS) ``` Colors: bg-bg-primary → white background bg-bg-secondary → light gray/blue (#f5f6f9 approximately) text-text-primary → near-black text text-text-secondary → gray text text-text-inverse → white text text-secondary → dark navy (accent) bg-secondary → light gray (sections) primary / text-primary → red-orange Breakpoints (mobile-first): base → < 640px sm: → ≥ 640px md: → ≥ 768px lg: → ≥ 1024px xl: → ≥ 1216px Typography (these are CSS class names): .text-h1 → 24px/32px mobile, 48px/56px xl .text-h2 → 20px/28px mobile, 36px/44px xl .text-h3 → 18px/28px mobile, 32px/40px xl Used via: Common patterns: Section wrapper: Gray section bg: ... Card: ``` ## Beads Task IDs - plait-es3: HowTo (P0, EMPTY) - plait-gu7: CtaBanner (P0, EMPTY) - plait-ail: Info (P0, EMPTY) - plait-do3: Benefits (P1, partial) - plait-c79: Conditions (P1, partial) - plait-b9i: Hero (P1, partial) ## Current File Contents ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/HowTo/HowTo.tsx` (EMPTY - implement) ```tsx export const HowTo = () => { return
; }; ``` ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/CtaBanner/CtaBanner.tsx` (EMPTY - implement) ```tsx export const CtaBanner = () => { return
; }; ``` ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Info/Info.tsx` (EMPTY - implement) ```tsx export const Info = () => { return
; }; ``` ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Benefits/Benefits.tsx` (PARTIAL - fix and style) ```tsx import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/helpers'; import { Box, Card, P } from '@/shared/ui'; const BENEFITS = [ { caption: 'Высокий доход', description: 'на выгодных условиях' }, { caption: 'Повышенная ставка', description: 'в первые 2 месяца' }, { caption: 'Выплата процентов', description: 'каждый месяц' }, { caption: 'Деньги защищены', description: 'агентством АСВ' }, ]; export const Benefits = () => ( {BENEFITS.map(({ description, caption }, i, arr) => (

{caption}

{description}

 ))} ); ``` Bug: `arr.length !== i - 1` is always true (should be `i !== arr.length - 1`). Goal: 4 benefit cards in a row on lg+, 2x2 grid on md, single column on mobile. Each card has a right border divider except the last. Add proper padding. ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Conditions/Conditions.tsx` (PARTIAL - fill and style) ```tsx 'use client'; import { Box, Card, HTag, Icon, P } from '@/shared/ui'; import MoneyIcon from './money.svg'; const CONDITIONS = [ { caption: 'Открытие счета', description: 'от любой суммы', icon: MoneyIcon }, { caption: 'Пополнение и снятие', description: 'доступно в любой момент' }, { caption: 'Проценты', description: 'начисляются на ежедневный остаток на счете' }, ]; export const Conditions = () => ( Условия по накопительному счету {CONDITIONS.map(({ caption, description, icon }, i) => (

{caption}

{description}

 {icon && } ))} {/* Empty card — fill with rate info */} ); ``` Goal: Fill the empty `` with rate/interest info (e.g., "до 16%" prominently displayed). Fix layout — conditions cards should have proper padding. Layout: on mobile stack vertically; on lg+ the conditions list is on the left (2/3 width) and the rate card is on the right (1/3). The rate card should visually highlight the "16% годовых" or similar key metric in large type. ### `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Hero/Hero.tsx` (PARTIAL - improve adaptive layout) ```tsx 'use client'; import { Cta } from '@/entities/plait'; import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/helpers'; import { Box, Container, HTag, Image, P } from '@/shared/ui'; import HeroIcon from './hero_plait.png'; export const Hero = () => ( Откройте Копилку
с выгодой до 16%

Вносите и выводите деньги в любое время

 ); ``` Goal: Add proper vertical padding to the hero section (pt-24 or similar to clear the fixed header, plus pb). Make image responsive — hidden on mobile, visible on md+. Keep the layout clean. ## What to Implement — Component by Component ### 1. HowTo (`plait-es3`) — "Как открыть счет" This is a step-by-step section showing how to open a savings account. Design this as a financial product "how to" section: **Steps:** 1. "Оставьте заявку" — Submit a request (fill in name and phone) 2. "Дождитесь звонка" — Wait for a callback from a specialist 3. "Откройте счет" — Open the account and start saving **Layout:** - Section title: `Как открыть счет` - Steps: on mobile — vertical column, on lg+ — horizontal row - Each step card: number (1, 2, 3) prominently shown + title + description - Step number style: large text (text-4xl or text-5xl), colored in `text-secondary` (dark navy) - Cards: use `` with `bordered` - No external images needed — use numbers/text only **Full implementation:** ```tsx 'use client'; import { Box, Card, HTag, P } from '@/shared/ui'; const STEPS = [ { step: '01', title: 'Оставьте заявку', description: 'Заполните имя и номер телефона в форме ниже', }, { step: '02', title: 'Дождитесь звонка', description: 'Наш специалист свяжется с вами и расскажет об условиях', }, { step: '03', title: 'Откройте счет', description: 'Выберите условия и начните копить уже сегодня', }, ]; ``` ### 2. CtaBanner (`plait-gu7`) — Баннер с картой Халва A promotional banner section. Assets available: - `halvacard.png` — image of Halva credit card (import from `./halvacard.png`) - `percent.png` — percentage icon/image (import from `./percent.png`) **Layout:** - Background: `bg-secondary` (light gray) - On mobile: stacked column - On md+: row with image(s) on one side, text+CTA on the other - Content: heading about Halva card benefits, CTA button using `` - The halvacard image should be visually prominent - Use `` from `@/shared/ui` for both images **Text content:** - Heading: "Оформите карту Халва" or "Получите карту Халва" - Subtext: "и получайте кешбэк на все покупки" or similar benefit text - CTA: `` (already handles the scroll behavior) **Structure:** ```tsx 'use client'; import { Cta } from '@/entities/plait'; import { Box, Card, HTag, Image, P } from '@/shared/ui'; import HalvaCard from './halvacard.png'; import PercentImg from './percent.png'; ``` ### 3. Info (`plait-ail`) — Информационный/правовой блок A legal disclaimer / informational block at the bottom of the page (before footer). **Content:** ``` Накопительный счет «Копилка». АО «Совкомбанк». Генеральная лицензия Банка России №963 от 5 декабря 2014 года. Процентная ставка 16% годовых действует в течение первых 2 месяцев. Далее ставка устанавливается в соответствии с тарифами банка. Проценты начисляются на ежедневный остаток по счету. Выплата процентов ежемесячно. Вклад застрахован в АСВ в соответствии с Федеральным законом № 177-ФЗ. Подробнее об условиях на сайте совкомбанк.рф. ``` **Style:** - Small secondary text: `

` with small text - No section title needed — this is fine print - Simple, no card/background needed ### 4. Benefits (`plait-do3`) — 4 карточки преимуществ Fix the bug and add proper styling: - Fix: `arr.length !== i - 1` → `i !== arr.length - 1` for dividers - Layout: - Mobile: 2 columns grid (2x2) - lg+: 4 columns in a row - Each cell: `p-6` padding, flex column, gap-2 between title and description - Title: `

` in larger text or `` - Border dividers: right border on all but last (in the row), use border-border-primary color - The outer `` should have `rounded-2xl` and `shadow` or `bordered` ### 5. Conditions (`plait-c79`) — Условия по счету Fill the empty right Card with rate information and improve the layout: **Right Card content (the empty ``):** ```tsx

Ставка по счету

до 16%

годовых в первые 2 месяца

 ``` **Left conditions cards:** give each card proper padding (p-4 or p-6), ensure the money.svg icon is sized correctly (use `width={60} height={60}` for the Icon). **Layout fix:** - Left side: `flex-1` or `flex-[2]`, right side: `flex-[1]` — so 2:1 ratio on lg+ - On mobile: full width stacked ### 6. Hero (`plait-b9i`) — Main Hero banner Improve the existing Hero: - Add `pt-28 pb-12 md:pt-32 md:pb-16 lg:pt-36 lg:pb-20` to the Container (to clear the fixed header) - Image: add `className='hidden md:block ...'` to hide on mobile, size it properly: `className='h-auto w-full max-w-md lg:max-w-lg'` with `imgClassName='object-contain'` - The text side: add `md:flex-1` to the text Box, `shrink-0` or similar to image ## Implementation Instructions 1. **Read each file first** before writing (you already know the current contents above, but always use Read tool to double-check) 2. **Write each component** using the Write tool 3. Do NOT add `'use client'` to components that don't use client-side features (HowTo, Info, Benefits don't need it; Conditions already has it; Hero already has it) 4. After implementing all components, run `bun run type-check` from `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait` to check for TypeScript errors 5. Run `bun run lint` to check for lint errors 6. Fix any errors found 7. Send `DONE: {summary}` when complete ## Files to Write | File | Action | |------|--------| | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/HowTo/HowTo.tsx` | Implement from scratch | | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/CtaBanner/CtaBanner.tsx` | Implement from scratch | | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Info/Info.tsx` | Implement from scratch | | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Benefits/Benefits.tsx` | Fix bug + restyle | | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Conditions/Conditions.tsx` | Fill empty Card + fix layout | | `/Users/zeizel/projects/plait/src/widgets/plait/ui/Hero/Hero.tsx` | Improve padding + image adaptive | Start implementing immediately. Begin with P0 components (HowTo, CtaBanner, Info), then P1 (Benefits, Conditions, Hero).
summary: Spawn react-developer to implement all 6 plait landing components
